files.value:
id: "d1e2f3a4-b5c6-7890-abcd-theme0000002"
displayName: "WSO2 Cloud Theme V2"
description: "Default theme for WSO2 Cloud login pages"
theme:
  direction: "ltr"
  defaultColorScheme: "light"
  colorSchemes:
    light:
      colors:
        primary:
          main: "#fa7b3f"
          dark: "#e74420"
          contrastText: "#ffffff"
        secondary:
          main: "#1a1a2e"
          dark: "#0d0d1a"
          contrastText: "#ffffff"
        background:
          default: "#f7f8fb"
          paper: "#ffffff"
        text:
          primary: "#000000"
          secondary: "#494848"
    dark:
      colors:
        primary:
          main: "#fa7b3f"
          dark: "#e74420"
          contrastText: "#ffffff"
        secondary:
          main: "#ff9966"
          dark: "#fa7b3f"
          contrastText: "#000000"
        background:
          default: "#121212"
          paper: "#1e1e1e"
        text:
          primary: "#ffffff"
          secondary: "#cccccc"
  shape:
    borderRadius: 8
  typography:
    fontFamily: "'Inter Variable', sans-serif"
    h1:
      fontSize: "1.75rem"
      fontWeight: 600
      lineHeight: 1.3

id: "d1e2f3a4-b5c6-7890-abcd-theme0000001"
displayName: "WSO2 Cloud Theme"
description: "Default theme for WSO2 Cloud login pages"
theme:
  direction: "ltr"
  defaultColorScheme: "light"
  colorSchemes:
    light:
      colors:
        primary:
          main: "#fa7b3f"
          dark: "#e74420"
          contrastText: "#ffffff"
        secondary:
          main: "#1a1a2e"
          dark: "#0d0d1a"
          contrastText: "#ffffff"
        background:
          default: "#f7f8fb"
          paper: "#ffffff"
        text:
          primary: "#000000"
          secondary: "#494848"
    dark:
      colors:
        primary:
          main: "#fa7b3f"
          dark: "#e74420"
          contrastText: "#ffffff"
        secondary:
          main: "#ff9966"
          dark: "#fa7b3f"
          contrastText: "#000000"
        background:
          default: "#121212"
          paper: "#1e1e1e"
        text:
          primary: "#ffffff"
          secondary: "#cccccc"
  shape:
    borderRadius: 8
  typography:
    fontFamily: "'Inter Variable', sans-serif"
    h1:
      fontSize: "1.75rem"
      fontWeight: 600
      lineHeight: 1.3

id: "f6a7b8c9-d0e1-2345-fabc-678901234567"
handle: auth_flow_config_wso2_cloud_disambiguation
name: WSO2 Cloud Authentication Flow with Disambiguation
flowType: AUTHENTICATION
nodes:
  - id: start
    type: START
    onSuccess: choose_auth

  # --- Choose social provider ---
  - id: choose_auth
    type: PROMPT
    meta:
      components:
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_001
          label: "Sign in to WSO2 Cloud"
          variant: HEADING_1
        - type: BLOCK
          id: block_001
          components:
            - eventType: TRIGGER
              id: action_google
              label: "Continue with Google"
              type: ACTION
              variant: SOCIAL
            - eventType: TRIGGER
              id: action_github
              label: "Continue with GitHub"
              type: ACTION
              variant: SOCIAL
    prompts:
      - action:
          ref: action_google
          nextNode: google_auth
      - action:
          ref: action_github
          nextNode: github_auth

  # --- Google ---
  - id: google_auth
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    properties:
      idpId: "456efc02-bad3-47bb-bd87-01cc94f8388c"
      allowAuthenticationWithoutLocalUser: true
      allowCrossOUProvisioning: true
    executor:
      name: GoogleOIDCAuthExecutor
    onSuccess: check_user_state

  # --- GitHub ---
  - id: github_auth
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    properties:
      idpId: "372a20db-a946-4b40-add0-0049d15a5f9c"
      allowAuthenticationWithoutLocalUser: true
      allowCrossOUProvisioning: true
    executor:
      name: GithubOAuthExecutor
    onSuccess: check_user_state

  # --- Check if user is ambiguous (exists in multiple OUs) ---
  # Runs only when userAmbiguous=true (set by OAuthExecutor).
  # When not ambiguous, skips to org_registration_prompt.
  - id: check_user_state
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: IdentifyingExecutor
      mode: resolve
      inputs:
        - identifier: sub
          type: TEXT_INPUT
          required: true
    onSuccess: org_registration_prompt
    onIncomplete: prompt_disambiguate
    condition:
      key: "{{ context.userAmbiguous }}"
      value: true
      onSkip: org_registration_prompt

  # --- Disambiguation: user exists in multiple OUs ---
  - id: prompt_disambiguate
    type: PROMPT
    meta:
      components:
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_disambig_title
          label: "Select your organization"
          variant: HEADING_1
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_disambig_subtitle
          label: "Your account exists in multiple organizations. Please select one to continue."
          variant: BODY_2
        - type: BLOCK
          id: block_disambig
          components:
            - id: select_ou
              ref: ouHandle
              type: SELECT
              label: "Organization"
              required: true
              placeholder: "Select your organization"
              options: []
            - type: ACTION
              id: action_select_ou
              label: "Continue"
              variant: PRIMARY
              eventType: SUBMIT
    prompts:
      - inputs:
          - ref: select_ou
            identifier: ouHandle
            type: SELECT
            required: true
        action:
          ref: action_select_ou
          nextNode: resolve_federated_user

  # --- Resolve disambiguated user (sets AuthenticatedUser) ---
  - id: resolve_federated_user
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: FederatedAuthResolverExecutor
      inputs:
        - identifier: ouHandle
          type: TEXT_INPUT
          required: true
    onSuccess: auth_assert
    onIncomplete: prompt_disambiguate

  # --- OU provisioning (new social users) ---
  - id: org_registration_prompt
    type: PROMPT
    meta:
      components:
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_org_title
          label: "Create Your Organization"
          variant: HEADING_1
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_org_subtitle
          label: "Set up your organization to get started"
          variant: BODY
        - type: BLOCK
          id: block_org
          components:
            - id: input_ou_name
              ref: ouName
              type: TEXT_INPUT
              label: "Organization Name"
              required: true
              placeholder: "Enter your organization name"
            - id: input_ou_handle
              ref: ouHandle
              type: TEXT_INPUT
              label: "Organization Handle"
              required: true
              placeholder: "Enter a unique handle (e.g., my-org)"
            - eventType: SUBMIT
              id: action_create_org
              label: "Create Organization"
              type: ACTION
              variant: PRIMARY
    prompts:
      - inputs:
          - ref: input_ou_name
            type: TEXT_INPUT
            identifier: ouName
            required: true
          - ref: input_ou_handle
            type: TEXT_INPUT
            identifier: ouHandle
            required: true
        action:
          ref: action_create_org
          nextNode: ou_creation
    condition:
      key: "{{ context.userEligibleForProvisioning }}"
      value: true
      onSkip: auth_assert

  - id: ou_creation
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: OUExecutor
    onSuccess: provisioning

  - id: provisioning
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: ProvisioningExecutor
    onSuccess: auth_assert

  # --- Final ---
  - id: auth_assert
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: AuthAssertExecutor
    onSuccess: end

  - id: end
    type: END

args:
if [ ! -f /data/.initialized ]; then
  echo "Copying database directory from image..."
  cp -r /opt/thunder/repository/database/* /data/
  touch /data/.initialized
  echo "Database initialization complete"
else
  echo "Database already initialized"
fi
initContainers.name: init-database

data.deployment.yaml:
server:
  hostname: "0.0.0.0"
  public_url: "${environmentConfigs.serverPublicUrl}"
  port: ${workload.endpoints["api"].port}
  http_only: true

gate_client:
  hostname: "${environmentConfigs.gateClientHostname}"
  port: {{.GATE_CLIENT_PORT}}
  scheme: "{{.GATE_CLIENT_SCHEME}}"

crypto:
  encryption:
    key: "{{.CRYPTO_ENCRYPTION_KEY}}"

database:
  config:
    type: "sqlite"
    sqlite:
      path: "{{.DB_CONFIG_PATH}}"
  runtime:
    type: "sqlite"
    sqlite:
      path: "{{.DB_RUNTIME_PATH}}"
  user:
    type: "sqlite"
    sqlite:
      path: "{{.DB_USER_PATH}}"

cache:
  disabled: false
  type: "inmemory"
  size: {{.CACHE_SIZE}}
  ttl: {{.CACHE_TTL}}
  eviction_policy: "LRU"
  cleanup_interval: 600

jwt:
  validity_period: {{.JWT_VALIDITY}}

oauth:
  refresh_token:
    renew_on_grant: true
    validity_period: {{.OAUTH_REFRESH_TOKEN_VALIDITY}}

flow:
  max_version_history: 3
  auto_infer_registration: true

cors:
  allowed_origins: {{.CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS}}

consent:
  enabled: {{.CONSENT_ENABLED}}
  base_url: "{{.CONSENT_BASE_URL}}"

server:
  hostname: "0.0.0.0"
  public_url: "${environmentConfigs.serverPublicUrl}"
  port: ${workload.endpoints["api"].port}
  http_only: true

gate_client:
  hostname: "${environmentConfigs.gateClientHostname}"
  port: {{.GATE_CLIENT_PORT}}
  scheme: "{{.GATE_CLIENT_SCHEME}}"

crypto:
  encryption:
    key: "{{.CRYPTO_ENCRYPTION_KEY}}"

database:
  config:
    type: "postgres"
    postgres:
      hostname: "{{.DB_CONFIG_HOSTNAME}}"
      port: {{.DB_PORT}}
      name: "{{.DB_CONFIG_NAME}}"
      username: "{{.DB_CONFIG_USERNAME}}"
      password: "{{.DB_CONFIG_PASSWORD}}"
      sslmode: "{{.DB_CONFIG_SSLMODE}}"
  runtime:
    type: "postgres"
    postgres:
      hostname: "{{.DB_RUNTIME_HOSTNAME}}"
      port: {{.DB_PORT}}
      name: "{{.DB_RUNTIME_NAME}}"
      username: "{{.DB_RUNTIME_USERNAME}}"
      password: "{{.DB_RUNTIME_PASSWORD}}"
      sslmode: "{{.DB_RUNTIME_SSLMODE}}"
  user:
    type: "postgres"
    postgres:
      hostname: "{{.DB_USER_HOSTNAME}}"
      port: {{.DB_PORT}}
      name: "{{.DB_USER_NAME}}"
      username: "{{.DB_USER_USERNAME}}"
      password: "{{.DB_USER_PASSWORD}}"
      sslmode: "{{.DB_USER_SSLMODE}}"

cache:
  disabled: false
  type: "inmemory"
  size: {{.CACHE_SIZE}}
  ttl: {{.CACHE_TTL}}
  eviction_policy: "LRU"
  cleanup_interval: 600

jwt:
  validity_period: {{.JWT_VALIDITY}}

oauth:
  refresh_token:
    renew_on_grant: true
    validity_period: {{.OAUTH_REFRESH_TOKEN_VALIDITY}}

flow:
  max_version_history: 3
  auto_infer_registration: true

cors:
  allowed_origins: {{.CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS}}

consent:
  enabled: {{.CONSENT_ENABLED}}
  base_url: "{{.CONSENT_BASE_URL}}"

args:
until [ -f /opt/thunder/repository/database/.setup-complete ]; do
  echo "Waiting for setup job to complete..."
  sleep 2
done
echo "Setup complete, starting Thunder..."
initContainers.name: wait-for-setup

spec.volumes: ${[{"name": "thunder-config", "configMap": {"name": metadata.componentName + "-config"}}, {"name": "gate-config", "configMap": {"name": metadata.componentName + "-gate-config"}}, {"name": "console-config", "configMap": {"name": metadata.componentName + "-console-config"}}, {"name": "sqlite-data", "persistentVolumeClaim": {"claimName": metadata.componentName + "-sqlite"}}] + configurations.toVolumes().map(v, {"name": v.name, "configMap": {"name": v.configMap.name}})}

spec.hostnames: ${[gateway.ingress.external.?http, gateway.ingress.external.?https].filter(g, g.hasValue()).map(g, g.value().host).distinct().map(h, metadata.environmentName + "-" + metadata.componentName + "-" + metadata.componentNamespace + "." + h)}

id: "d1e2f3a4-b5c6-7890-abcd-theme0000001"
displayName: "WSO2 Cloud Theme new 123"
description: "Default theme for WSO2 Cloud login pages"
theme:
  direction: "ltr"
  defaultColorScheme: "light"
  colorSchemes:
    light:
      colors:
        primary:
          main: "#fa7b3f"
          dark: "#e74420"
          contrastText: "#ffffff"
        secondary:
          main: "#1a1a2e"
          dark: "#0d0d1a"
          contrastText: "#ffffff"
        background:
          default: "#f7f8fb"
          paper: "#ffffff"
        text:
          primary: "#000000"
          secondary: "#494848"
    dark:
      colors:
        primary:
          main: "#fa7b3f"
          dark: "#e74420"
          contrastText: "#ffffff"
        secondary:
          main: "#ff9966"
          dark: "#fa7b3f"
          contrastText: "#000000"
        background:
          default: "#121212"
          paper: "#1e1e1e"
        text:
          primary: "#ffffff"
          secondary: "#cccccc"
  shape:
    borderRadius: 8
  typography:
    fontFamily: "'Inter Variable', sans-serif"
    h1:
      fontSize: "1.75rem"
      fontWeight: 600
      lineHeight: 1.3

id: "c7d8e9f0-1a2b-3c4d-5e6f-7a8b9c0d1e2f"
name: "WSO2 Cloud Console"
description: "WSO2 Cloud Console frontend application"
url: "http://development-thunder-thunder-idp.openchoreoapis.localhost:19080"
logo_url: "http://development-thunder-thunder-idp.openchoreoapis.localhost:19080/assets/logo.svg"
is_registration_flow_enabled: false
certificate:
  type: "NONE"
  value: ""
inbound_auth_config:
  - type: "oauth2"
    config:
      client_id: "CLOUD_CONSOLE"
      redirect_uris:
        - "http://development-thunder-thunder-idp.openchoreoapis.localhost:19080/callback"
        - "http://development-thunder-thunder-idp.openchoreoapis.localhost:19080/callback"
      grant_types:
        - "authorization_code"
        - "refresh_token"
      response_types:
        - "code"
      token_endpoint_auth_method: "none"
      pkce_required: true
      public_client: true
      token:
        access_token:
          validity_period: 3600
          user_attributes:
            - "given_name"
            - "family_name"
            - "email"
            - "groups"
            - "name"
            - "roles"
            - "ouId"
            - "ouName"
            - "ouHandle"
        id_token:
          validity_period: 3600
          user_attributes:
            - "given_name"
            - "family_name"
            - "email"
            - "groups"
            - "name"
            - "ouId"
            - "ouName"
            - "ouHandle"
      scope_claims:
        profile:
          - "name"
          - "given_name"
          - "family_name"
          - "picture"
          - "ouId"
          - "ouName"
          - "ouHandle"
        email:
          - "email"
          - "email_verified"
        phone:
          - "phone_number"
          - "phone_number_verified"
        group:
          - "groups"
allowed_user_types:
  - "Customer"

args:
if [ ! -f /data/.initialized ]; then
  echo "Copying database directory from image..."
  cp -r /opt/thunder/repository/database/* /data/
  touch /data/.initialized
  echo "Database initialization complete"
else
  echo "Database already initialized"
fi
initContainers.name: init-database

          - "phone_number"
          - "phone_number_verified"
        group:
          - "groups"
allowed_user_types:
  - "Customer"

args:
if [ ! -f /data/.initialized ]; then
  echo "Copying database directory from image..."
  cp -r /opt/thunder/repository/database/* /data/
  touch /data/.initialized
  echo "Database initialization complete"
else
  echo "Database already initialized"
fi
initContainers.name: init-database

cache:

flow:
  max_version_history: 3

  allowed_origins: {{.CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS}}

server:

crypto:

database:

    type: "postgres"
    postgres:
      hostname: "{{.DB_RUNTIME_HOSTNAME}}"
      port: {{.DB_PORT}}
      name: "{{.DB_RUNTIME_NAME}}"

    postgres:
      hostname: "{{.DB_USER_HOSTNAME}}"
      port: {{.DB_PORT}}
      name: "{{.DB_USER_NAME}}"
      username: "{{.DB_USER_USERNAME}}"
      password: "{{.DB_USER_PASSWORD}}"
      sslmode: "{{.DB_USER_SSLMODE}}"

cache:
  disabled: false
  type: "inmemory"
  size: {{.CACHE_SIZE}}
  ttl: {{.CACHE_TTL}}
  eviction_policy: "LRU"
  cleanup_interval: 600

jwt:
  validity_period: {{.JWT_VALIDITY}}

oauth:
  refresh_token:
    renew_on_grant: true
    validity_period: {{.OAUTH_REFRESH_TOKEN_VALIDITY}}

flow:
  max_version_history: 3
  auto_infer_registration: true

cors:
  allowed_origins: {{.CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS}}

consent:
  enabled: {{.CONSENT_ENABLED}}
  base_url: "{{.CONSENT_BASE_URL}}"

args:
until [ -f /opt/thunder/repository/database/.setup-complete ]; do
  echo "Waiting for setup job to complete..."
  sleep 2
done
echo "Setup complete, starting Thunder..."
initContainers.name: wait-for-setup

files.value:
id: "d1e2f3a4-b5c6-7890-abcd-theme0000001"
displayName: "WSO2 Cloud Theme"
description: "Default theme for WSO2 Cloud login pages"
theme:
  direction: "ltr"
  defaultColorScheme: "light"
  colorSchemes:
    light:
      colors:
        primary:
          main: "#fa7b3f"
          dark: "#e74420"
          contrastText: "#ffffff"
        secondary:
          main: "#1a1a2e"
          dark: "#0d0d1a"
          contrastText: "#ffffff"
        background:
          default: "#f7f8fb"
          paper: "#ffffff"
        text:
          primary: "#000000"
          secondary: "#494848"
    dark:
      colors:
        primary:
          main: "#fa7b3f"
          dark: "#e74420"
          contrastText: "#ffffff"
        secondary:
          main: "#ff9966"
          dark: "#fa7b3f"
          contrastText: "#000000"
        background:
          default: "#121212"
          paper: "#1e1e1e"
        text:
          primary: "#ffffff"
          secondary: "#cccccc"
  shape:
    borderRadius: 8
  typography:
    fontFamily: "'Inter Variable', sans-serif"
    h1:
      fontSize: "1.75rem"
      fontWeight: 600
      lineHeight: 1.3

id: "f6a7b8c9-d0e1-2345-fabc-678901234567"
handle: auth_flow_config_wso2_cloud_disambiguation
name: WSO2 Cloud Authentication Flow with Disambiguation
flowType: AUTHENTICATION
nodes:
  - id: start
    type: START
    onSuccess: choose_auth

  # --- Choose social provider ---
  - id: choose_auth
    type: PROMPT
    meta:
      components:
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_001
          label: "Sign in to WSO2 Cloud"
          variant: HEADING_1
        - type: BLOCK
          id: block_001
          components:
            - eventType: TRIGGER
              id: action_google
              label: "Continue with Google"
              type: ACTION
              variant: SOCIAL
            - eventType: TRIGGER
              id: action_github
              label: "Continue with GitHub"
              type: ACTION
              variant: SOCIAL
    prompts:
      - action:
          ref: action_google
          nextNode: google_auth
      - action:
          ref: action_github
          nextNode: github_auth

  # --- Google ---
  - id: google_auth
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    properties:
      idpId: "456efc02-bad3-47bb-bd87-01cc94f8388c"
      allowAuthenticationWithoutLocalUser: true
      allowCrossOUProvisioning: true
    executor:
      name: GoogleOIDCAuthExecutor
    onSuccess: check_user_state

  # --- GitHub ---
  - id: github_auth
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    properties:
      idpId: "372a20db-a946-4b40-add0-0049d15a5f9c"
      allowAuthenticationWithoutLocalUser: true
      allowCrossOUProvisioning: true
    executor:
      name: GithubOAuthExecutor
    onSuccess: check_user_state

  # --- Check if user is ambiguous (exists in multiple OUs) ---
  # Runs only when userAmbiguous=true (set by OAuthExecutor).
  # When not ambiguous, skips to org_registration_prompt.
  - id: check_user_state
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: IdentifyingExecutor
      mode: resolve
      inputs:
        - identifier: sub
          type: TEXT_INPUT
          required: true
    onSuccess: org_registration_prompt
    onIncomplete: prompt_disambiguate
    condition:
      key: "{{ context.userAmbiguous }}"
      value: true
      onSkip: org_registration_prompt

  # --- Disambiguation: user exists in multiple OUs ---
  - id: prompt_disambiguate
    type: PROMPT
    meta:
      components:
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_disambig_title
          label: "Select your organization"
          variant: HEADING_1
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_disambig_subtitle
          label: "Your account exists in multiple organizations. Please select one to continue."
          variant: BODY_2
        - type: BLOCK
          id: block_disambig
          components:
            - id: select_ou
              ref: ouHandle
              type: SELECT
              label: "Organization"
              required: true
              placeholder: "Select your organization"
              options: []
            - type: ACTION
              id: action_select_ou
              label: "Continue"
              variant: PRIMARY
              eventType: SUBMIT
    prompts:
      - inputs:
          - ref: select_ou
            identifier: ouHandle
            type: SELECT
            required: true
        action:
          ref: action_select_ou
          nextNode: resolve_federated_user

  # --- Resolve disambiguated user (sets AuthenticatedUser) ---
  - id: resolve_federated_user
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: FederatedAuthResolverExecutor
      inputs:
        - identifier: ouHandle
          type: TEXT_INPUT
          required: true
    onSuccess: auth_assert
    onIncomplete: prompt_disambiguate

  # --- OU provisioning (new social users) ---
  - id: org_registration_prompt
    type: PROMPT
    meta:
      components:
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_org_title
          label: "Create Your Organization"
          variant: HEADING_1
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_org_subtitle
          label: "Set up your organization to get started"
          variant: BODY
        - type: BLOCK
          id: block_org
          components:
            - id: input_ou_name
              ref: ouName
              type: TEXT_INPUT
              label: "Organization Name"
              required: true
              placeholder: "Enter your organization name"
            - id: input_ou_handle
              ref: ouHandle
              type: TEXT_INPUT
              label: "Organization Handle"
              required: true
              placeholder: "Enter a unique handle (e.g., my-org)"
            - eventType: SUBMIT
              id: action_create_org
              label: "Create Organization"
              type: ACTION
              variant: PRIMARY
    prompts:
      - inputs:
          - ref: input_ou_name
            type: TEXT_INPUT
            identifier: ouName
            required: true
          - ref: input_ou_handle
            type: TEXT_INPUT
            identifier: ouHandle
            required: true
        action:
          ref: action_create_org
          nextNode: ou_creation
    condition:
      key: "{{ context.userEligibleForProvisioning }}"
      value: true
      onSkip: auth_assert

  - id: ou_creation
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: OUExecutor
    onSuccess: provisioning

  - id: provisioning
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: ProvisioningExecutor
    onSuccess: auth_assert

  # --- Final ---
  - id: auth_assert
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: AuthAssertExecutor
    onSuccess: end

  - id: end
    type: END

args:
if [ ! -f /data/.initialized ]; then
  echo "Copying database directory from image..."
  cp -r /opt/thunder/repository/database/* /data/
  touch /data/.initialized
  echo "Database initialization complete"
else
  echo "Database already initialized"
fi
initContainers.name: init-database

files.value:
id: "d1e2f3a4-b5c6-7890-abcd-theme0000001"
displayName: "WSO2 Cloud Theme"
description: "Default theme for WSO2 Cloud login pages"
theme:
  direction: "ltr"
  defaultColorScheme: "light"
  colorSchemes:
    light:
      colors:
        primary:
          main: "#fa7b3f"
          dark: "#e74420"
          contrastText: "#ffffff"
        secondary:
          main: "#1a1a2e"
          dark: "#0d0d1a"
          contrastText: "#ffffff"
        background:
          default: "#f7f8fb"
          paper: "#ffffff"
        text:
          primary: "#000000"
          secondary: "#494848"
    dark:
      colors:
        primary:
          main: "#fa7b3f"
          dark: "#e74420"
          contrastText: "#ffffff"
        secondary:
          main: "#ff9966"
          dark: "#fa7b3f"
          contrastText: "#000000"
        background:
          default: "#121212"
          paper: "#1e1e1e"
        text:
          primary: "#ffffff"
          secondary: "#cccccc"
  shape:
    borderRadius: 8
  typography:
    fontFamily: "'Inter Variable', sans-serif"
    h1:
      fontSize: "1.75rem"
      fontWeight: 600
      lineHeight: 1.3

id: "c7d8e9f0-1a2b-3c4d-5e6f-7a8b9c0d1e2f"
name: "WSO2 Cloud Console"
description: "WSO2 Cloud Console frontend application"
url: "http://development-thunder-thunder-idp.openchoreoapis.localhost:19080"
logo_url: "http://development-thunder-thunder-idp.openchoreoapis.localhost:19080/assets/logo.svg"
is_registration_flow_enabled: false
certificate:
  type: "NONE"
  value: ""
inbound_auth_config:
  - type: "oauth2"
    config:
      client_id: "CLOUD_CONSOLE"
      redirect_uris:
        - "http://development-thunder-thunder-idp.openchoreoapis.localhost:19080/callback"
        - "http://development-thunder-thunder-idp.openchoreoapis.localhost:19080/callback"
      grant_types:
        - "authorization_code"
        - "refresh_token"
      response_types:
        - "code"
      token_endpoint_auth_method: "none"
      pkce_required: true
      public_client: true
      token:
        access_token:
          validity_period: 3600
          user_attributes:
            - "given_name"
            - "family_name"
            - "email"
            - "groups"
            - "name"
            - "roles"
            - "ouId"
            - "ouName"
            - "ouHandle"
        id_token:
          validity_period: 3600
          user_attributes:
            - "given_name"
            - "family_name"
            - "email"
            - "groups"
            - "name"
            - "ouId"
            - "ouName"
            - "ouHandle"
      scope_claims:
        profile:
          - "name"
          - "given_name"
          - "family_name"
          - "picture"
          - "ouId"
          - "ouName"
          - "ouHandle"
        email:
          - "email"
          - "email_verified"
        phone:
          - "phone_number"
          - "phone_number_verified"
        group:
          - "groups"
allowed_user_types:
  - "Customer"
